creator: kudzu@tenebras.com
text:
Upon cvsup after announcement of 4.3-RELEASE, make world and
make kernel,  the following error is reported continuously:

Apr 22 19:43:00 laptop /kernel: wi0: wi_cmd: device timeout (cmd=11, val=f100)

Lucent WaveLAN Gold 802.11 card 11 Mbps  Firmware rev 6.16

How-To-Repeat: Problem is persistent
